mapper.select: SELECT fr.id, fr.from_user_id, fr.to_user_id, fr.message, fr.status, fr.create_time, fr.handle_time, u.nickname AS from_nickname, u.avatar AS from_avatar, u.username AS from_username FROM friend_request fr LEFT JOIN user u ON fr.from_user_id = u.id WHERE fr.to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND fr.status = 0 ORDER BY fr.create_time DESC

SELECT fr.id, fr.from_user_id, fr.to_user_id, fr.message, fr.status, fr.create_time, fr.handle_time, u.nickname AS from_nickname, u.avatar AS from_avatar FROM friend_request fr LEFT JOIN user u ON fr.from_user_id = u.id WHERE fr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_request (from_user_id, to_user_id, message, status) VALUES (#{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{message}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_request SET status = #{status}, handle_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
